title: rubus × pseudomuelleri
intro: Rubus × pseudomuelleri, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Rubus and is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high anthocyanin content, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudomuelleri include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health and protect against certain diseases. Rubus × pseudomuelleri is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be consumed as dietary supplements to reap its health benefits.
